measures.name: Applications
measures.description: Total submitted credit applications.

measures.name: Approved Applications
measures.description: Approved application count.

measures.name: Approval Rate
measures.description: Approved applications divided by total applications.

measures.name: Disbursed Loans
measures.description: Funded loan count.

measures.name: Disbursement Amount
measures.description: Total funded amount.

measures.name: Loan Book Balance
measures.description: Outstanding principal balance in selected snapshot context.

measures.name: DPD 30+ Balance
measures.description: Outstanding balance with 30 or more days past due.

measures.name: DPD 60+ Balance
measures.description: Outstanding balance with 60 or more days past due.

measures.name: NPL Balance
measures.description: Outstanding 90+ DPD or non-performing balance.

measures.name: Delinquency Rate
measures.description: DPD 30+ balance divided by loan book balance.

measures.name: NPL Rate
measures.description: NPL balance divided by loan book balance.

measures.name: Expected Loss
measures.description: Expected credit loss amount.

measures.name: Expected Loss Rate
measures.description: Expected loss divided by loan book balance.

measures.name: Provision Amount
measures.description: Provision amount calculated from expected loss policy.

measures.name: Provision Coverage
measures.description: Provision amount divided by expected loss.

measures.name: Autopay Failure Loans
measures.description: Loans with autopay failure flag.

measures.name: Recovery Amount
measures.description: Total recovery amount from collection cases.

measures.name: Case Balance
measures.description: Total balance assigned to collection cases.

measures.name: Recovery Rate
measures.description: Recovered amount divided by collection case balance.

measures.name: Collections SLA %
measures.description: Share of collection cases handled within SLA.

measures.name: Promise To Pay %
measures.description: Share of cases with promise to pay.

measures.name: Vintage 30+ Rate
measures.description: Vintage cohort DPD 30+ balance share.

measures.name: Vintage Loss Rate
measures.description: Average cumulative loss rate across visible vintage cells.

measures.name: Roll Rate
measures.description: Average roll rate across selected transition cells.

measures.name: Forecast Provision
measures.description: Forecast provision amount.

measures.name: Forecast Expected Loss
measures.description: Forecast expected loss.

measures.name: Incremental Provision
measures.description: Incremental provision bridge amount.

expression: let Source = #table(type table [MeasureName = text], {{"KPI"}}) in Source
